34.       The authorities concurred with staff’s call to accelerate structural reforms, and noted
that a large number of initiatives and projects were underway guided by NDS3. The newly
established National Planning Council highlighted its role in prioritizing reforms, ensuring inter-
agency coordination and monitoring progress. The authorities agreed with staff recommendation to
focus reforms on boosting human capital and innovation, enhancing the business environment,
attracting FDI and promoting exports. They agreed that Qatar was well placed to leverage AI for
productivity gains, and highlighted Qatar’s comparative advantage in energy cost and reliability to
attract data centers, around which an ecosystem could be built to enhance domestic value added.
